title: We need to get logs testing to pass with journald driver.
body:
We attempted to switch default to journald, but tests were blowing up.

We need to fix these and to double the logging tests to run on both k8s_file and journald.

comments.body: @ashley-cui Once you get your secrets merged, I would like you to work on this, so we can change the default to journald.
Sounds good, I'll take a look :)
